blocks.description: Program header comments, OPTIONS with format search path, LIBNAME definitions for HR master, staging, and reports, TITLE statements for workforce analysis report
DATA step computing employee metrics using INTCK/INTNX: current age with birthday adjustment, tenure in years and months, retirement date projection, and compa-ratio (salary vs grade midpoint)
PROC FORMAT defining three custom value formats: salary bands (Under $40K to $150K+), tenure groups (Less than 1yr to 20+), and age brackets (Under 25 to 55+)
PROC SQL joining derived employee data with department master and employee master (self-join for manager lookup) to build comprehensive employee detail table
PROC TABULATE producing cross-tabulation of salary and tenure statistics by department and job grade with grand totals
PROC MEANS computing departmental compensation summary: mean/median salary, average compa-ratio, average tenure, and headcount
Section header comments and ODS HTML open statement directing output to styled HTML report file
PROC PRINT outputting formatted compensation summary with labeled columns for department headcount, salary statistics, compa-ratio, and tenure
ODS HTML close statement and TITLE reset
